session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report all results. Do NOT fix any errors — just report what passes and what fails.
session.assistant: I'll execute the `make fast-ci` command and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check all tests and linting

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
## Fast CI Results
**Exit Code: 2 (Failure)**
### Passing Checks: - **Lint (ruff)**: All checks passed - **Format Check (ruff format)**: 1657 files already formatted - **AGENTS.md standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md pairing**: All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 files, 0 violations) - **Exec Reference Check**: OK - .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5685 passed in 12.98s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.59s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.86s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 24 passed (in progress when output cut off)
### Failing Checks: **Prettier (Format Check - Markdown)**: Code style issues found in **2 files** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These two markdown files need formatting with Prettier to fix the code style violations.
